questions.question: How do the UI maintenance panels (*Maint.java) coordinate with their corresponding *Data.java classes to implement CRUD operations across different modules like inv, ord, and pur?
What architectural pattern connects IBlueSeerT implementations to database transaction handling, and how does it differ from IBlueSeer interface usage?
Which packages depend on BlueSeerUtils and what shared functionality do they use across the application?
How does the EDI module integrate with core ERP modules (ord, pur, shp, inv) to process inbound and outbound transactions?
What is the relationship between *Control.java panels and their corresponding *Maint.java panels, and how do they manage module-level configuration?
How do the *Browse.java panels interact with *Data.java classes to implement search and selection functionality across different modules?
What architectural pattern is used for asynchronous database operations across all maintenance panels, and how does error handling flow through the system?
How does the package structure (com.blueseer.inv, ord, pur, shp, fgl, etc.) reflect the modular architecture of the ERP system, and what cross-module dependencies exist?
What role does the OVData class play across different modules, and how does it differ from BlueSeerUtils in terms of shared functionality?
How do the Data classes (invData, ordData, purData, etc.) implement the pattern of private underscore-prefixed methods (_addOrderMstr, _updateItemMstr) in relation to public methods?
How does the remote database architecture work across modules, and what role does sendServerPost() play in the client-server communication?
What is the relationship between *Rpt.java report panels and *Data.java classes, and how do they integrate with the Jasper reporting framework?
How do the EDIMaps classes (Generic850i, Generic856o, etc.) in the EDIMaps package coordinate with the EDI module classes to transform data between EDI formats and database structures?
What design pattern is used for data structure classes (item_mstr, so_mstr, po_mstr) within *Data.java files, and how are they instantiated and used across modules?
How does the financial module (fgl package) integrate with transactional modules (ord, pur, inv, shp) to capture accounting entries?
What is the purpose of the IBlueSeerc interface used by Control panels, and how does it differ from IBlueSeerT used by transaction maintenance panels?
How do the shipping module (shp package) and receiving module (rcv package) interact with order management (ord) and purchasing (pur) to complete the order-to-cash and procure-to-pay cycles?
What role does the MainFrame class in the bsmf package play in coordinating cross-module functionality, and what shared resources does it provide?
How does the production module (prd package) integrate with inventory (inv), scheduling (sch), and order management (ord) to manage manufacturing operations?
What standardized error handling and messaging pattern is used across all Data class CRUD methods, and how does it propagate to the UI layer?
How do the customer (ctr package) and vendor (vdr package) master data modules support transactional modules (ord, pur, fap, far)?
What is the architecture for handling multi-site and multi-company operations across the different functional modules?
How do the label generation (lbl package) and printing utilities integrate with inventory (inv) and shipping (shp) modules?
How does the time and attendance module (tca package) integrate with production (prd) and human resources (hrm) to track labor costs and productivity?
What architectural pattern governs the relationship between transaction detail tables and master tables across all modules, and how is this pattern implemented in Data classes?

When a sales order is created via OrderMaint.addOrderTransaction, what sequence of service calls occurs across ordData, cusData, and invData classes to validate customer, check inventory, and persist the order?

How does shipper confirmation trigger inventory updates and GL entries - trace the full call chain from ShipperConfirm through shpData._confirmShipperTransaction to invData._updateInventoryFromShipper and fglData._glEntryFromShipper?

What services coordinate when an EDI 850 document is processed into a sales order - specifically how does bs850jsonToDB.java interact with ediData, ordData, cusData, and invData to create the complete order transaction?

When a receiver is confirmed via RecvMaint and rcvData.addReceiverTransaction, what chain of service calls updates inventory balances, PO status, and creates GL entries across rcvData, invData, purData, and fglData?

Trace the service coordination when a voucher is created and approved - how do VoucherMaint, fapData.VoucherTransaction, fglData._glEntryFromVoucher, and venData interact to complete the AP transaction?

How does the shipper confirmation process coordinate AR entry creation - what is the interaction between shpData._confirmShipperTransaction, shpData._updateOrderFromShipper, and OVData.AREntry to create invoices and update order status?
When a PO is created via POMaint and purData.addPOTransaction, what validation and cross-reference calls occur across purData, venData, invData, and fglData before the transaction is committed?

What service calls are triggered when processing shipper vouchers during confirmation - trace the flow from shpData._processShipperVouchers through fapData._VoucherTransaction to fglData._glEntryFromVoucher?

How does service order confirmation differ from regular order confirmation - compare the call chains in shpData._confirmShipperTransaction when type equals 'serviceorder' versus 'order', including invData._updateInventoryFromJob and fglData._glEntryFromSrvJobScan?

When creating a shipper transaction via shpData.addShipperTransaction, what services are called to validate customer ship-to addresses, calculate taxes, and reserve inventory across shpData, cusData, fglData.getTaxDet, and invData?
Trace the service interaction when an EDI 810 invoice is generated from a shipper - how do shpData.init_edi810_object, ediData methods, and farData coordinate to create the outbound EDI document?

What is the complete service call chain when a PO is received and vouchered simultaneously - how do RecvMaint, rcvData.addReceiverTransaction, fapData.VoucherTransaction, and fglData coordinate in a single transaction?
How does the order update process work when OrderMaint.updateOrderTransaction is called - what deletion and re-insertion logic occurs across ordData for sod_det, so_tax, sod_tax, and sos_det records?

When shpData._updateInventoryFromShipper is called during shipper confirmation, how does it interact with invData._updateInventoryBalance and invData._addTranMstr to decrement inventory and create transaction records?

What services coordinate during EDI 856 ASN generation - trace the flow from shpData.init_edi856_object through ediData for partner routing and how ship_det and ship_tree records are transformed into EDI segments?

How does the GL entry process coordinate when multiple accounting events occur - trace how fglData.glEntryXP is called from shpData._glEntryFromShipper, rcvData, and fapData._glEntryFromVoucher with different account types?

When a quote is converted to an order, what service interactions occur - how does QuoteMaint coordinate with ordData.addOrderTransaction and what data transformations happen between quo_mstr/quo_det and so_mstr/sod_det?

Trace the service coordination when processing an EDI 204 freight order - how do the EDI maps interact with frtData to create carrier freight orders, and what validations occur across cusData and shpData?

What is the complete service flow when receiver inventory updates trigger PO line status changes - how do rcvData._updateInventoryFromReceiver and purData._updatePOFromReceiver coordinate to update pod_mstr.pod_rcvd_qty and pod_status?

How does the tax calculation cascade work during order creation - trace the service calls from OrderMaint through cusData.getCustShipSet, fglData.getTaxPercentByState/getTaxPercentByZip, and back to ordData for so_tax and sod_tax creation?
When multiple shippers reference the same sales order, how does shpData._updateOrderFromShipper coordinate partial versus complete order status updates across ship_det and sod_det aggregations?
What service coordination occurs during job completion for service orders - trace how prdData job clock transactions interact with ordData service order updates and invData inventory adjustments?

How does the customer pricing lookup cascade work during order entry - what is the service call chain from OrderMaint through cusData.getDiscountRecsByCust, cusData._getCMSDet for contract pricing, and invData for cost calculations?

When a shipper is confirmed with type 'freight', what different service paths are taken - how does shpData._confirmShipperTransaction skip inventory updates but still process vouchers via fapData and GL entries via fglData?

Trace the complete service interaction during billing transaction processing - how do ordData.addBillingTransaction, ordData._billTrans, farData for AR creation, and fglData for revenue recognition coordinate across multiple database transactions?
What validation sequence occurs before a sales order can be added in OrderMaint.java, and which files enforce duplicate PO prevention, customer validation, and status checks?
How does the system prevent inventory allocation conflicts when multiple sales orders request the same item, and which files coordinate inventory availability checks with order allocation?
What business rules govern purchase order creation in POMaint.java, and how do purData.java, venData.java, and invData.java collaborate to validate vendor items, pricing, and material requirements?

Explain the constraint enforcement flow when confirming a shipper in ShipperControl.java and ShipperMaint.java - what validations span across ordData, invData, shpData, and farData to ensure data integrity?
How do ItemMaint.java and invData.java prevent deletion or modification of items that are referenced in active BOMs, open orders, or inventory transactions?

What are the multi-table validation rules for receiving material against a purchase order in RecvMaint.java, and how do purData, invData, and fapData coordinate to enforce over-receipt prevention and cost validation?
Describe the cascading business logic when changing a BOM in BOMMaint.java - what constraints exist across invData, prdData, and ordData to prevent breaking existing work orders or planned orders?
How do customer credit limit checks work across cusData.java, ordData.java, and farData.java when creating a sales order, and what business rules determine if an order can exceed the credit limit?
What validation rules prevent negative inventory in invData.java, and how do inventory transactions coordinate with ordData, shpData, and prdData to enforce inventory accuracy?

Explain the workflow state transitions for sales orders in OrderMaint.java and ordData.java - what business rules govern transitions between OPEN, ALLOCATED, SHIPPED, and INVOICED states across multiple tables?
How does the system enforce fiscal period controls across fglData.java when posting transactions from ordData, shpData, purData, and fapData, and what prevents posting to closed periods?

What are the cross-module constraints when processing an EDI 850 purchase order through EDI.java - how do ediData, ordData, cusData, and invData collaborate to validate trading partner rules and item cross-references?
How do tax calculation rules work across fglData.java, ordData.java, and shpData.java for sales orders and invoices, and what business logic determines tax applicability by jurisdiction?
What validation prevents creating circular routing relationships in RoutingMaint.java, and how do invData, prdData, and OVData coordinate to ensure work center capacity and routing step dependencies?
Describe the multi-file validation workflow for vendor payment processing in PaymentMaint.java - how do fapData, venData, fglData, and OVData ensure payment accuracy and prevent duplicate payments?
How does work order material issuance in prdData.java validate BOM requirements against inventory availability in invData.java, and what prevents over-issuing or incorrect component substitution?
What business rules in OrderMaint.java and ordData.java govern order modification after initial creation, and how do change tracking, audit trails, and financial implications span multiple modules?
How do serial number controls in invData.java and shpData.java prevent duplicate serial assignments and ensure complete traceability from receipt through shipment across multiple transactions?

What are the constraint enforcement mechanisms for customer pricing in CustPriceMaint.java - how do ordData, cusData, and invData coordinate volume breaks, contract pricing, and promotional pricing hierarchies?

Describe the allocation and deallocation logic in ordData.java - what prevents allocation conflicts when inventory is reallocated between orders, and how do shpData and invData coordinate during allocation changes?
How does cost rollup in CostRollMaint.java and invData.java cascade through BOM levels, and what validation prevents cost inconsistencies between parent assemblies and components?

What validation workflow occurs in ShipperMaint.java when processing shipments for drop-ship orders, and how do ordData, purData, and invData coordinate to bypass inventory for direct vendor shipments?
How do UOM (Unit of Measure) conversions in UOMConvMaint.java and invData.java ensure consistency across purchasing, inventory, and sales transactions, and what prevents conversion errors?

What business rules in ReqMaint.java and purData.java govern purchase requisition approval workflow, and how do multi-level approvals coordinate with budget controls in fglData and inventory requirements from invData?

How does order acknowledgement data flow through EDI 855 processing? Describe how bs855ToDB and ordData coordinate to update sales order status and communicate changes back to customers.
